reproduction: git clone https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin && git checkout v28.x && git apply docs/INTEGRATION_PATCH.patch && cmake -B build -DSECP256K1_BACKEND=ultrafast -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION=ON && cmake --build build -j$(nproc) && ctest --test-dir build -j$(nproc)
note_compiler: Current run: GCC 14.2.0 — 749/749 pass. Earlier Clang 19.1.7 run against v28.0 showed 693/693 (preserved in history). See docs/BITCOIN_CORE_BENCH_RESULTS.json §test_suite.

notable_fixes.issue: musig2_key_agg forced even-Y on all input keys (BIP-327 violation)
notable_fixes.fix: src/cpu/src/musig2.cpp: use decompress_point respecting 33-byte prefix Y parity

history.note: After hybrid pubkey fix, before musig2 Y-parity fix
